description: Critical guardrails and state machine for safe git workflow

guardrails.name: Never Author as AI
guardrails.rule: All commits must be authored by human developer identity, never AI/bot identity
prevention: git config user.name                  # Check before every push
git config user.email                 # Must be real human email
git config --local user.name 'Your Name'  # Fix if wrong

recovery.or_alternative: git reset HEAD~1; git config --local user.name 'Your Name'; git commit -m '...'

guardrails.name: No AI Slop in PRs/Commits
guardrails.rule: PR descriptions and commit messages must be specific, human-written, avoiding generic templates
good_examples:
feat: restore DragRevealMonitor from uxrefine/mvp
  Allows users to open Notch by dragging files near screen top.

fix: remap ColumnPath on FSEvents rename
  Previously, rename/move could leave orphaned paths.
prevention: Describe EXACTLY what was done (not generic templates)
Include commit refs, file paths, actual changes
guardrails.detection_trigger: Before PR creation or commit message

recovery.if_violated: GitHub: Edit PR description; OR Close PR and create new one with proper language

guardrails.name: Never Direct Merge to main/develop
guardrails.rule: Never use `git merge` directly on main or develop branches. Always use PR workflow via GitHub UI.
violations: git checkout main; git merge feature-branch
git checkout develop; git merge feature-branch
enforcement: Always create feature branch: git checkout -b feat/...
Always push to feature branch: git push origin feat/...
Always merge via GitHub UI button (never CLI)

recovery.if_violated: git revert -m 1 <merge-commit> && git push origin main

transitions.message: Must not commit directly to main/develop!

states.description: Verify git user identity is human
states.check: git config user.name && git config user.email

transitions.message: Fix git config --local user.name before continuing

states.description: Verify commit message is specific, not AI Slop
Create PR with specific description (no AI Slop)
Await code review and CI/CD checks on GitHub
Merge via GitHub UI ONLY (never CLI)
STOP: Cannot work on protected branches
states.recovery: git checkout -b feat/new-branch && git reset develop

states.description: STOP: Git identity is not human
STOP: Message/description is AI Slop (generic template)

pre_push_checklist.expected: Changes make sense and are intentional

pr_template.title: [MUST NOT CONTAIN: AI Slop, generic templates]

description_structure.content: Describe exactly what was done (specific, not generic)

repository_scope: Never author commits with AI identity; always use human developer identity
Never use generic AI-generated language (AI Slop) in PR descriptions, commit messages, or notices
Never perform direct merges into main or develop branches
